meaning: n.涓昏鏁屼汉,[鍩虹潱鏁橾鎾掓棪
examples: A great word that means the same as your archenemy is Nemesis.
The lampblack of the kitchen is the archenemy of mom, to this everybody detest.
Everyone's favorite mechanical hero returns to face his archenemy one more time in this nerve-racking test of skill.
Republicans, who rarely get face time with the president, embraced and took pictures with their archenemy.
Deflation is the archenemy of all commodity markets, including precious metals.
